title: OCS/GCS qquota schema
description: Schema describing the JSON output of qquota including active resource limits and the effective resource quota rule filters as reported by the command.

quota_usage.description: List of effective quota usages or static quota limits reported by qquota.

exclude.description: Indicates whether the filter entry is an exclusion.

name.description: Name or pattern of the filter entry as reported by qquota.

filterEntryList.description: List of filter entries as reported by qquota. When present, the list contains at least one entry.

rqs_name.description: Name of the resource quota set.

rule_name.description: Name or ordinal identifier of the resource quota rule within the resource quota set.

resource.description: Name of the resource for which the quota is defined.

used.description: Amount of the resource currently used if the resource is consumable. Omitted for static or non-consumable limits.

max.description: Maximum allowed amount of the resource if consumable, or static limit if non-consumable.

users.description: User filter entries as reported by qquota.

projects.description: Project filter entries as reported by qquota.

pes.description: Parallel environment filter entries as reported by qquota.

queues.description: Cluster queue filter entries as reported by qquota.

hosts.description: Host filter entries as reported by qquota.
